summary: Tested drink management features: accept, decline, delete in Connections > Drinks tab, and 'View in Drinks' button in Notifications. All 16 backend tests passed. All frontend UI flows verified working correctly via Playwright.

drink_acceptance_in_drinks_tab.description: Green checkmark button on pending drinks triggers POST /api/drink-token/{id}/accept. Toast shows 'Drink offer accepted! 🍸'. Button changes to trash delete icon after acceptance.

drink_decline_with_modal.description: X button opens 'Politely Decline Drink' modal with 4 options. After selection, calls POST /api/drinks/decline/{id}. Toast shows 'Drink offer politely declined'. Status changes to 'Declined' with trash icon.

delete_accepted_drinks.description: Trash icon appears for accepted drinks. Click triggers DELETE /api/drink-token/{id}. Toast shows 'Drink offer removed'. Drink disappears from list.

delete_declined_drinks.description: Trash icon appears for declined drinks. Same delete flow works. Verified backend rejects deletion of pending drinks with 400 error.

view_in_drinks_button_in_notifications.description: Notifications page shows 'View in Drinks' button (amber/orange) instead of Accept/Decline for drink_token notifications. Button navigates to /connections?tab=drinks.
view_in_drinks_button_in_notifications.verified_ui: 9 'View in Drinks' buttons found, 0 Accept buttons found

navigation_from_notifications_to_drinks.description: Clicking 'View in Drinks' navigates from /notifications to /connections?tab=drinks. Drinks tab is active on arrival.

passed_tests: test_drink_has_required_fields - All required UI fields present

ui_tests_verified.drinks_tab: Displays all received drinks with correct status indicators (✅ Accepted, ❌ Declined, 🍸 Pending)
ui_tests_verified.accept_button: Green checkmark visible on pending drinks, triggers accept endpoint, shows success toast
ui_tests_verified.decline_button: X button visible on pending drinks, opens polite decline modal with 4 options
ui_tests_verified.delete_button: Trash icon visible on accepted/declined drinks, triggers delete endpoint, shows 'Drink offer removed' toast
ui_tests_verified.notifications_page: 'View in Drinks' button replaces Accept/Decline for drink notifications

critical_code_review_comments: Frontend correctly uses singular /api/drink-token/ endpoints (not plural drink-tokens)
DELETE endpoint properly validates that recipients can only delete accepted/declined drinks
Notifications page correctly shows 'View in Drinks' instead of Accept/Decline buttons
Navigation with tab=drinks parameter works correctly via useSearchParams hook
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_drink_management.py - Created comprehensive test suite for drink management
seed_data_creation: Test drinks generated via POST /api/test/generate-drink during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Drink management features fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/drink-token/{id}/accept for accepting, POST /api/drinks/decline/{id} for declining with reason, DELETE /api/drink-token/{id} for removing accepted/declined drinks. Notifications show 'View in Drinks' button that navigates to /connections?tab=drinks. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_drink_management.py covers all drink management functionality.
mocked_api_note: Google Places API falls back to seeded venue data when GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY is not set
